title: Fit test - 1st screen UI
scenario: Fit Test initial screen UI does not match Figma design when accessed from Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) connected via Bluetooth.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, locate and tap Fit Test.
4. Observe the Fit Test first screen UI.
expected: The Fit Test first screen UI and text match the Figma design specifications.
